commands.notes: Built 20 fr pages, skipped Swahili writes, generated sitemap-i18n.xml, added 828 reciprocal tags, removed 2 duplicate tags.
Regenerated sitemaps after detecting the two new Swahili blog stubs missing from sitemap-sw.xml.

canonicalAliasPolicy: The only indexable Swahili route missing from sitemap-sw.xml is sw/salary-tax/index.html, which canonicalizes to /sw/mshahara-na-kodi/ and is intentionally not included as a canonical alias.
generatedChurnNote: build:i18n:full and npm run sitemap produced broad generated/i18n churn in the already dirty checkout; this report does not revert unrelated generated or non-Swahili changes.
